name: Bristol 1350
description: Bristol 1350 is Facade Games' Dark Cities entry set in plague-stricken medieval England — a dice-driven race game where players roll forward toward the city gate while the Black Death stalks the procession, infecting carts and spreading by die-roll between neighbors. Some players are doctors trying to escape; some are healthy townsfolk; some are already infected and just want company. The race goes to the lucky.
